message:
feat(demo_showcase): Add overlay system with help, palette, and tour

Implements the overlay infrastructure for demo_showcase:
- OverlayAnim: Animation state with eased transitions (0.15 progress/tick)
- HelpState: Scrollable help panel with keybinding sections
- PaletteState: Command palette with fuzzy filtering and keyboard nav
- TourState: Guided tour with 6 steps highlighting different panels

Overlay rendering:
- Semi-transparent backdrop blending over all panels
- Centered glass-panel overlays with accent-colored borders
- Keyboard navigation (Up/Down/Enter/Esc)
- Progress bar in tour mode

Also fixes clippy warnings:
- Use *cell instead of cell.clone() for Copy types
- Use .clamp() instead of .max().min() patterns
- Use let...else instead of match for unwrapping ParseResult
- Use struct literals with ..Default::default() in tests
- Add cast allow attributes for precision-loss in tour progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
